steps.title: Identify the antecedent for the pronoun
steps.content: The blank is the object of “attributed,” and it must refer back to “the wobble” (singular)—what the astronomers attributed to the gravitational influence.

steps.title: Apply pronoun-antecedent agreement
steps.content: ”It” is the singular pronoun that correctly matches the singular antecedent “the wobble.” The other options fail to match: B and D are plural pronouns, and A (each) doesn't fit the context. That matches choice C — C is correct.
